name: Blue Cheese Dress
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cheese with a little hot water.
2. Add the remainder of ingredients and mix in a blender or electric mixer.
3. Refrigerate.
Makes 1 1/2 quarts. You can use a pint of mayonnaise and half of another ingredient if desired. If you enjoy garlic, add more. ENJOY! Once you try this, you'll never buy bottled again!
